subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1919-12-21
subcodes.first_line: Yes, Achor is this same 'Akka. The Westerners refer to 'Akka as Achor. Over the course of history, it has acquired many names. At first it was 'Aúk, then became 'akúr [Achor] and afterwards 'Akka
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلی عاکور همین عکاست فرنگی ها به عکا عاکور میگویند در طول مدت تاریخ
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture
